description: Take fashionable dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to slip in and out of their shoes with ease.UpperLeather upper for maximum durability, breathability and styleLace-ups for a snug FitSquare toe box for a roomy fitStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeCurved and padded collar with a fabric inner for comfortFabric inner lining for maximum breathabilityPadded fabric footbed with extra cushioning in the backfoot for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole ergonomically designed to offer maximum comfortStacked heel with multi directional lugs on the forefoot and heelShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
